scenarios.name: Gmail spam-folder audit for a transactional subdomain
scenarios.rationale: Treatment ran dig +short TXT for SPF/DKIM selectors and _dmarc, checked SPF lookup count against the 10-lookup limit, flagged DMARC p=none and Return-Path/From alignment per the skill, and prioritized fixes by Critical/High/Medium/Low; baseline only suggested 'check SPF and DKIM' without the lookup count, alignment check, or staged DMARC progression.

scenarios.name: Outlook 550 5.7.1 rejection diagnosis
scenarios.rationale: Treatment interpreted 550 5.7.1 as content/policy rejection, checked DKIM d= alignment vs the sending domain, ran the reversed-IP DNSBL loop against zen.spamhaus.org/barracudacentral/spamcop, and recommended mail-tester.com verification before bulk sending — all documented patterns; baseline gave generic 'check reputation and warm IPs' advice without alignment or DNSBL queries.
